TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Bsuring, title = Bsuring, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bsuring} }

S.FORM: = Bsuring = Nsgan Bsuring o gaga Nsgan Skangki, kmpraan kana dxgal o 1,623.87 km¬≤, (dxgal dgiyaq o 1,489.3 km¬≤, dxgal pmblxan o 88.31 km¬≤). kmhbragan hiyi o 14,830, sapah o 4,504, seejiq tnpusu 13,244 hiyi, knhbragan hiyi o 89%(Truku). Truku ka hbaraw balay alang hini. Pusu nniqan alang Niqan seasug tru snslian alang ka alang Bsuring nii, saw Minc, Bsuring ni Minsyang. Nniqan alang Nyusan Skanki nsgan Bsuring alang Bsuring. Gasuc nniqan Ssiyaw hraan hidaw gsilung Taypingyang, skrayan dha o kika elug rulu rqngul ni alang Sincgn, alang Sungan, hunac o sdalih hari alang Dawkas, daya o lutuc hari alang Kulu kida. Lnglingay tiri Dxgal sttu, saw hari 20~40 knjisan ka babaw dgiyaq nii. Pkkla patas ppanun Mgrig rulu: Bukuy dtuwa mnuda Sincng saw Tay9 syeyn do pqiri Hwa 8 syeyn kika mtmay alang Bsuring. Ppanan basu: Tduwa ppanun quri saw Bsuring, Sincgn, Cungte basu skanki, dhuq nniqan sngayan basu Bsuring do kika balay bi dhuq. Sjiqan klgan nealang Truku. Djiyun kari Kari truku ni Tlu. Snhiyun cungcyaw Pnrhulan Joro ni Teyeyncucyaw. Pnaah alang Pnhiyuq alang bsuring nii o niqan tru alang, saw Minc,Bsuring, Minsyang. Tnhjil hini kana ka nseejiq alang Bsuring, djiyun bi ŤäíŤćČ skama ka dhiya, kiya ni ini biyaw mhru, ni ini biyaw keeman bi qmita, kika tmhangan dha Bsuring. Kika balay bi hangan hini uri da. Bukuy Kwanfu do, priyux hangan Slin, sugun dha tna isil seejiq ka hangan do, kika priyux hangan Bsuring dungan. Seuxal bi alang Minc o pusu bi seejiq Kuruse kana tnhjil hini, seuxal o mniq daya bi gqiyan hidaw Yani hiya han. Hngkawas 13, mnhtu snluan ka elug alang Bsuring do, kika lutuc thjil hini kana ka seejiq Sitakanseni Kuluse, yasa keegu hari ka seejiq Kulu, kika tmhangan dha alang Kulu. Bukuy priyux Mincsecyu. Hnici lntulan laqi seejiq Tawkas kana ka alang Mincyang, Mniq gqiyan hidaw daya breenux dgiyaq. Pgkla patas rmigaw Kmlawa Bsuring klwaan sapah-Pkkla ana manu saan rmigaw. Nyusan qpahan Nsgan Bsuring o niqan 9 alang ni maxal 18. 18 o, Knlibu , Gukut , Tkijig , Bsngan , Pratan , Kdusan , Kulu , Tpuqu , Dowras , Bsuring , Kulu , Dowmung , Ibuh , Tmunan , Myawan , Branaw , Qowgan , Qnragan . Pusu pnyahan patas Hangan alang Alang Bsuring Tukubeycu na alang Alang Bsuring pa psnakan tuturu alang, kiya ka alang alang Mincu mi alang Bsuring mi alang Minsyang. Nniqan niya Nyusan Skangki Bsuring go Bsuring cwen. Knlbangan Hnruwan hidaw u mquri Taypingyang, msuayus elu kisya mi Sujyo cwen mi Swenan cwen, wa mniq sqapah tuhunac ka alang Doras, tudaya u mslutuc alang Kulu. Nniqan lnglingay Dxral msttu, haypa 20-40 m. Quri ppanan rulu Mriq rulu: Malu muda Tay 9 seyng hmrinas Sujyo daw mriqi muda Hwa 8 seyng mtmay alang Bsuring. Tapa basu: Malu tapa basu Skangki kndadax alang mkbrnux Skangki tapa basu mquri Bsuring mi, Sujyo mi, Tkiji, mniq trduwan basu Bsuring tuting basu daw dhuq da. Ppwaluk tyeyn-cu patas qtan alang Teyn-cu patas pkla nniqan alang. Klwanan sediq Seejiq Truku Sduwi na kari saya Kari Seejiq Truku, kari Telu. Snlhayan snhiyan Bsuring Kiristo Cyoro Kyokay, Bsuring Teynskyokay. Pnyahan alang Alang Bsuring pa psnakan tuturu alang, kiya ka alang alang Mincu mi alang Bsuring mi alang Minsyang. Sediq tnualang Bsuring cbiyaw miyah thdil alang hini pa, dmuwi kingal kluwan bhngin ptahu puniq, binaw ini biyaw hmuru ka tasun na, kiya mi mbsuring balay da, kiya splawa dha "Bsuring" ka hini, dmuwi hangal niyi ka hangan alng niyi uri, hangan Telu daw wada dha brahan "Syorin" da. Mwaya bay miyah thdil hini ka sediq tnualang Kulu, pusu bay alang pnyahan dha pa kiya ka wa mniq daya pryaxan hidaw Yani. Kngkawas 1924 cida, wada mhdu mwelu ka elu alang Bsuring, alang Sdagan mi alang Kulu ka msnul miyah thdil hini, alaw hbaraw ka sediq alang Kulu, kiya ka splawa "Alang Kulu". Alang Minsyang pa hbaraw bay ka llutuc alang Doras, wa mniq dxral daya oryaxan hidaw ka pusu nniqan dha cbiyaw, mniq diyax qnlhangan Tanah Tinux cbiyaw cida pa, pngalan kari alang ka dmudul stabuy miyah thdil dxral hini. Quri pplahan mi sanan rmiwaw == Qntan patas ==
S.PHON: = bsu…ĺiŇč = nsgan bsu…ĺiŇč o gaga nsgan skaŇčki, kmp…ĺaan kana dxgal o *,***.** km*, (dxgal dgijaq o *,***.* km*, dxgal pmblxan o **.** km*). kmńßb…ĺagan ńßiji o **,***, sapańß o *,***, s…ô…ô…üiq tnpusu **,*** ńßiji, knńßb…ĺagan ńßiji o **%(t…ĺuku). t…ĺuku ka ńßba…ĺaw balaj alaŇč ńßini. pusu nniqan alaŇč niqan s…ôasug t…ĺu snslian alaŇč ka alaŇč bsu…ĺiŇč nii, saw min ¶, bsu…ĺiŇč ni minsjaŇč. nniqan alaŇč njusan skanki nsgan bsu…ĺiŇč alaŇč bsu…ĺiŇč. gasu ¶ nniqan ssijaw ńß…ĺaan ńßidaw gsiluŇč tajpiŇčjaŇč, sk…ĺajan dńßa o kika …ôlug …ĺulu …ĺqŇčul ni alaŇč sin ¶gn, alaŇč suŇčan, ńßuna ¶ o sdalińß ńßa…ĺi alaŇč dawkas, daja o lutu ¶ ńßa…ĺi alaŇč kulu kida. lŇčliŇčaj ti…ĺi dxgal sttu, saw ńßa…ĺi **~** kn…üisan ka babaw dgijaq nii. pkkla patas ppanun mg…ĺig …ĺulu: bukuj dtuwa mnuda sin ¶Ňč saw taj* sj…ôn do pqi…ĺi ńßwa * sj…ôn kika mtmaj alaŇč bsu…ĺiŇč. ppanan basu: tduwa ppanun qu…ĺi saw bsu…ĺiŇč, sin ¶gn, ¶uŇčt…ô basu skanki, dńßuq nniqan sŇčajan basu bsu…ĺiŇč do kika balaj bi dńßuq. s…üiqan klgan n…ôalaŇč t…ĺuku. d…üijun ka…ĺi ka…ĺi t…ĺuku ni tlu. snńßijun ¶uŇč ¶jaw pn…ĺńßulan …üo…ĺo ni t…ô…ôn ¶u ¶jaw. pnaańß alaŇč pnńßijuq alaŇč bsu…ĺiŇč nii o niqan t…ĺu alaŇč, saw min ¶,bsu…ĺiŇč, minsjaŇč. tnńß…üil ńßini kana ka ns…ô…ô…üiq alaŇč bsu…ĺiŇč, d…üijun bi ** skama ka dńßija, kija ni ini bijaw mńß…ĺu, ni ini bijaw k…ô…ôman bi qmita, kika tmńßaŇčan dńßa bsu…ĺiŇč. kika balaj bi ńßaŇčan ńßini u…ĺi da. bukuj kwan*u do, p…ĺijux ńßaŇčan slin, sugun dńßa tna isil s…ô…ô…üiq ka ńßaŇčan do, kika p…ĺijux ńßaŇčan bsu…ĺiŇč duŇčan. s…ôuxal bi alaŇč min ¶ o pusu bi s…ô…ô…üiq ku…ĺus…ô kana tnńß…üil ńßini, s…ôuxal o mniq daja bi gqijan ńßidaw jani ńßija ńßan. ńßŇčkawas **, mnńßtu snluan ka …ôlug alaŇč bsu…ĺiŇč do, kika lutu ¶ tńß…üil ńßini kana ka s…ô…ô…üiq sitakans…ôni kulus…ô, jasa k…ô…ôgu ńßa…ĺi ka s…ô…ô…üiq kulu, kika tmńßaŇčan dńßa alaŇč kulu. bukuj p…ĺijux min ¶s…ô ¶ju. ńßni ¶i lntulan laqi s…ô…ô…üiq tawkas kana ka alaŇč min ¶jaŇč, mniq gqijan ńßidaw daja b…ĺ…ô…ônux dgijaq. pgkla patas …ĺmigaw kmlawa bsu…ĺiŇč klwaan sapańß-pkkla ana manu saan …ĺmigaw. njusan qpańßan nsgan bsu…ĺiŇč o niqan * alaŇč ni maxal **. ** o, knlibu , gukut , tki…üig , bsŇčan , p…ĺatan , kdusan , kulu , tpuqu , dow…ĺas , bsu…ĺiŇč , kulu , dowmuŇč , ibuńß , tmunan , mjawan , b…ĺanaw , qowgan , qn…ĺagan . pusu pnjańßan patas ńßaŇčan alaŇč alaŇč bsu…ĺiŇč tukub…ô ¶u na alaŇč alaŇč bsu…ĺiŇč pa psnakan tutu…ĺu alaŇč, kija ka alaŇč alaŇč min ¶u mi alaŇč bsu…ĺiŇč mi alaŇč minsjaŇč. nniqan nija njusan skaŇčki bsu…ĺiŇč go bsu…ĺiŇč ¶w…ôn. knlbaŇčan ńßn…ĺuwan ńßidaw u mqu…ĺi tajpiŇčjaŇč, msuajus …ôlu kisja mi su…üjo ¶w…ôn mi sw…ônan ¶w…ôn, wa mniq sqapańß tuńßuna ¶ ka alaŇč do…ĺas, tudaja u mslutu ¶ alaŇč kulu. nniqan lŇčliŇčaj dx…ĺal msttu, ńßajpa **-** m. qu…ĺi ppanan …ĺulu m…ĺiq …ĺulu: malu muda taj * s…ôŇč ńßm…ĺinas su…üjo daw m…ĺiqi muda ńßwa * s…ôŇč mtmaj alaŇč bsu…ĺiŇč. tapa basu: malu tapa basu skaŇčki kndadax alaŇč mkb…ĺnux skaŇčki tapa basu mqu…ĺi bsu…ĺiŇč mi, su…üjo mi, tki…üi, mniq t…ĺduwan basu bsu…ĺiŇč tutiŇč basu daw dńßuq da. ppwaluk tj…ôn- ¶u patas qtan alaŇč t…ôn- ¶u patas pkla nniqan alaŇč. klwanan s…ôdiq s…ô…ô…üiq t…ĺuku sduwi na ka…ĺi saja ka…ĺi s…ô…ô…üiq t…ĺuku, ka…ĺi t…ôlu. snlńßajan snńßijan bsu…ĺiŇč ki…ĺisto ¶jo…ĺo kjokaj, bsu…ĺiŇč t…ônskjokaj. pnjańßan alaŇč alaŇč bsu…ĺiŇč pa psnakan tutu…ĺu alaŇč, kija ka alaŇč alaŇč min ¶u mi alaŇč bsu…ĺiŇč mi alaŇč minsjaŇč. s…ôdiq tnualaŇč bsu…ĺiŇč ¶bijaw mijańß tńßdil alaŇč ńßini pa, dmuwi kiŇčal kluwan bńßŇčin ptańßu puniq, binaw ini bijaw ńßmu…ĺu ka tasun na, kija mi mbsu…ĺiŇč balaj da, kija splawa dńßa "bsu…ĺiŇč" ka ńßini, dmuwi ńßaŇčal niji ka ńßaŇčan alŇč niji u…ĺi, ńßaŇčan t…ôlu daw wada dńßa b…ĺańßan "sjo…ĺin" da. mwaja baj mijańß tńßdil ńßini ka s…ôdiq tnualaŇč kulu, pusu baj alaŇč pnjańßan dńßa pa kija ka wa mniq daja p…ĺjaxan ńßidaw jani. kŇčkawas **** ¶ida, wada mńßdu mw…ôlu ka …ôlu alaŇč bsu…ĺiŇč, alaŇč sdagan mi alaŇč kulu ka msnul mijańß tńßdil ńßini, alaw ńßba…ĺaw ka s…ôdiq alaŇč kulu, kija ka splawa "alaŇč kulu". alaŇč minsjaŇč pa ńßba…ĺaw baj ka llutu ¶ alaŇč do…ĺas, wa mniq dx…ĺal daja o…ĺjaxan ńßidaw ka pusu nniqan dńßa ¶bijaw, mniq dijax qnlńßaŇčan tanańß tinux ¶bijaw ¶ida pa, pŇčalan ka…ĺi alaŇč ka dmudul stabuj mijańß tńßdil dx…ĺal ńßini. qu…ĺi pplańßan mi sanan …ĺmiwaw == qntan patas ==
S.FORM: = Bsuring = Nsgan Bsuring o gaga Nsgan Skangki, kmpraan kana dxgal o 1,623.87 km¬≤, (dxgal dgiyaq o 1,489.3 km¬≤, dxgal pmblxan o 88.31 km¬≤). kmhbragan hiyi o 14,830, sapah o 4,504, seejiq tnpusu 13,244 hiyi, knhbragan hiyi o 89%(Truku). Truku ka hbaraw balay alang hini. Pusu nniqan alang Niqan seasug tru snslian alang ka alang Bsuring nii, saw Minc, Bsuring ni Minsyang. Nniqan alang Nyusan Skanki nsgan Bsuring alang Bsuring. Gasuc nniqan Ssiyaw hraan hidaw gsilung Taypingyang, skrayan dha o kika elug rulu rqngul ni alang Sincgn, alang Sungan, hunac o sdalih hari alang Dawkas, daya o lutuc hari alang Kulu kida. Lnglingay tiri Dxgal sttu, saw hari 20~40 knjisan ka babaw dgiyaq nii. Pkkla patas ppanun Mgrig rulu: Bukuy dtuwa mnuda Sincng saw Tay9 syeyn do pqiri Hwa 8 syeyn kika mtmay alang Bsuring. Ppanan basu: Tduwa ppanun quri saw Bsuring, Sincgn, Cungte basu skanki, dhuq nniqan sngayan basu Bsuring do kika balay bi dhuq. Sjiqan klgan nealang Truku. Djiyun kari Kari truku ni Tlu. Snhiyun cungcyaw Pnrhulan Joro ni Teyeyncucyaw. Pnaah alang Pnhiyuq alang bsuring nii o niqan tru alang, saw Minc,Bsuring, Minsyang. Tnhjil hini kana ka nseejiq alang Bsuring, djiyun bi ŤäíŤćČ skama ka dhiya, kiya ni ini biyaw mhru, ni ini biyaw keeman bi qmita, kika tmhangan dha Bsuring. Kika balay bi hangan hini uri da. Bukuy Kwanfu do, priyux hangan Slin, sugun dha tna isil seejiq ka hangan do, kika priyux hangan Bsuring dungan. Seuxal bi alang Minc o pusu bi seejiq Kuruse kana tnhjil hini, seuxal o mniq daya bi gqiyan hidaw Yani hiya han. Hngkawas 13, mnhtu snluan ka elug alang Bsuring do, kika lutuc thjil hini kana ka seejiq Sitakanseni Kuluse, yasa keegu hari ka seejiq Kulu, kika tmhangan dha alang Kulu. Bukuy priyux Mincsecyu. Hnici lntulan laqi seejiq Tawkas kana ka alang Mincyang, Mniq gqiyan hidaw daya breenux dgiyaq. Pgkla patas rmigaw Kmlawa Bsuring klwaan sapah-Pkkla ana manu saan rmigaw. Nyusan qpahan Nsgan Bsuring o niqan 9 alang ni maxal 18. 18 o, Knlibu , Gukut , Tkijig , Bsngan , Pratan , Kdusan , Kulu , Tpuqu , Dowras , Bsuring , Kulu , Dowmung , Ibuh , Tmunan , Myawan , Branaw , Qowgan , Qnragan . Pusu pnyahan patas Hangan alang Alang Bsuring Tukubeycu na alang Alang Bsuring pa psnakan tuturu alang, kiya ka alang alang Mincu mi alang Bsuring mi alang Minsyang. Nniqan niya Nyusan Skangki Bsuring go Bsuring cwen. Knlbangan Hnruwan hidaw u mquri Taypingyang, msuayus elu kisya mi Sujyo cwen mi Swenan cwen, wa mniq sqapah tuhunac ka alang Doras, tudaya u mslutuc alang Kulu. Nniqan lnglingay Dxral msttu, haypa 20-40 m. Quri ppanan rulu Mriq rulu: Malu muda Tay 9 seyng hmrinas Sujyo daw mriqi muda Hwa 8 seyng mtmay alang Bsuring. Tapa basu: Malu tapa basu Skangki kndadax alang mkbrnux Skangki tapa basu mquri Bsuring mi, Sujyo mi, Tkiji, mniq trduwan basu Bsuring tuting basu daw dhuq da. Ppwaluk tyeyn-cu patas qtan alang Teyn-cu patas pkla nniqan alang. Klwanan sediq Seejiq Truku Sduwi na kari saya Kari Seejiq Truku, kari Telu. Snlhayan snhiyan Bsuring Kiristo Cyoro Kyokay, Bsuring Teynskyokay. Pnyahan alang Alang Bsuring pa psnakan tuturu alang, kiya ka alang alang Mincu mi alang Bsuring mi alang Minsyang. Sediq tnualang Bsuring cbiyaw miyah thdil alang hini pa, dmuwi kingal kluwan bhngin ptahu puniq, binaw ini biyaw hmuru ka tasun na, kiya mi mbsuring balay da, kiya splawa dha "Bsuring" ka hini, dmuwi hangal niyi ka hangan alng niyi uri, hangan Telu daw wada dha brahan "Syorin" da. Mwaya bay miyah thdil hini ka sediq tnualang Kulu, pusu bay alang pnyahan dha pa kiya ka wa mniq daya pryaxan hidaw Yani. Kngkawas 1924 cida, wada mhdu mwelu ka elu alang Bsuring, alang Sdagan mi alang Kulu ka msnul miyah thdil hini, alaw hbaraw ka sediq alang Kulu, kiya ka splawa "Alang Kulu". Alang Minsyang pa hbaraw bay ka llutuc alang Doras, wa mniq dxral daya oryaxan hidaw ka pusu nniqan dha cbiyaw, mniq diyax qnlhangan Tanah Tinux cbiyaw cida pa, pngalan kari alang ka dmudul stabuy miyah thdil dxral hini. Quri pplahan mi sanan rmiwaw == Qntan patas ==
S.PHON: = bsu…ĺiŇč = nsgan bsu…ĺiŇč o gaga nsgan skaŇčki, kmp…ĺaan kana dxgal o *,***.** km*, (dxgal dgijaq o *,***.* km*, dxgal pmblxan o **.** km*). kmńßb…ĺagan ńßiji o **,***, sapańß o *,***, minsjaŇč. nniqan alaŇč njusan skanki nsgan bsu…ĺiŇč alaŇč bsu…ĺiŇč. gasu ¶ nniqan ssijaw ńß…ĺaan ńßidaw gsiluŇč tajpiŇčjaŇč, sk…ĺajan dńßa o kika …ôlug …ĺulu …ĺqŇčul ni alaŇč sin ¶gn, alaŇč suŇčan, ńßuna ¶ o sdalińß ńßa…ĺi alaŇč dawkas, daja o lutu ¶ ńßa…ĺi alaŇč kulu kida. lŇčliŇčaj ti…ĺi dxgal sttu, saw ńßa…ĺi **~** kn…üisan ka babaw dgijaq nii. pkkla patas ppanun mg…ĺig …ĺulu: bukuj dtuwa balaj bi dńßuq. s…üiqan klgan n…ôalaŇč t…ĺuku. d…üijun ka…ĺi ka…ĺi t…ĺuku ni tlu. snńßijun ¶uŇč ¶jaw pn…ĺńßulan …üo…ĺo ni t…ô…ôn ¶u ¶jaw. pnaańß alaŇč pnńßijuq alaŇč bsu…ĺiŇč nii o niqan t…ĺu alaŇč, saw min ¶,bsu…ĺiŇč, minsjaŇč. tnńß…üil ńßini kana ka ns…ô…ô…üiq alaŇč bsu…ĺiŇč, d…üijun bi ** skama ka dńßija, kija ni ini bijaw mńß…ĺu, ni ini bijaw k…ô…ôman bi qmita, kika tmńßaŇčan dńßa bsu…ĺiŇč. kika balaj bi ńßaŇčan ńßini u…ĺi da. bukuj kwan*u do, p…ĺijux ńßaŇčan slin, sugun dńßa tna isil s…ô…ô…üiq ka ńßaŇčan do, kika p…ĺijux ńßaŇčan bsu…ĺiŇč duŇčan. s…ôuxal bi alaŇč min ¶ o pusu bi s…ô…ô…üiq ku…ĺus…ô kana tnńß…üil ńßini, s…ôuxal o mniq daja bi gqijan ńßidaw jani ńßija ńßan. ńßŇčkawas **, mnńßtu snluan ka …ôlug alaŇč bsu…ĺiŇč do, kika lutu ¶ tńß…üil ńßini kana ka s…ô…ô…üiq sitakans…ôni kulus…ô, jasa k…ô…ôgu ńßa…ĺi ka s…ô…ô…üiq kulu, kika tmńßaŇčan dńßa alaŇč kulu. bukuj p…ĺijux min ¶s…ô ¶ju. ńßni ¶i lntulan laqi s…ô…ô…üiq tawkas kana ka alaŇč min ¶jaŇč, mniq gqijan ńßidaw daja b…ĺ…ô…ônux dgijaq. pgkla patas …ĺmigaw kmlawa bsu…ĺiŇč klwaan sapańß-pkkla ana manu saan …ĺmigaw. njusan qpańßan nsgan bsu…ĺiŇč o niqan * alaŇč ni maxal **. ** o, knlibu , gukut , tki…üig , bsŇčan , p…ĺatan , kdusan , kulu , tpuqu , dow…ĺas , bsu…ĺiŇč , kulu , dowmuŇč , ibuńß , tmunan , mjawan , b…ĺanaw , qowgan , qn…ĺagan . pusu pnjańßan patas ńßaŇčan alaŇč alaŇč bsu…ĺiŇč tukub…ô ¶u na alaŇč alaŇč bsu…ĺiŇč pa psnakan tutu…ĺu alaŇč, kija ka alaŇč alaŇč min ¶u mi alaŇč bsu…ĺiŇč mi alaŇč minsjaŇč. nniqan nija njusan skaŇčki bsu…ĺiŇč go bsu…ĺiŇč ¶w…ôn. knlbaŇčan ńßn…ĺuwan ńßidaw u mqu…ĺi tajpiŇčjaŇč, msuajus …ôlu kisja mi su…üjo ¶w…ôn mi sw…ônan ¶w…ôn, wa mniq sqapańß tuńßuna ¶ ka alaŇč do…ĺas, tudaja u mslutu ¶ alaŇč kulu. nniqan lŇčliŇčaj dx…ĺal msttu, ńßajpa **-** m. qu…ĺi ppanan …ĺulu m…ĺiq …ĺulu: malu muda taj * s…ôŇč ńßm…ĺinas su…üjo daw m…ĺiqi muda ńßwa * s…ôŇč mtmaj alaŇč bsu…ĺiŇč. tapa basu: malu tapa basu skaŇčki kndadax alaŇč mkb…ĺnux skaŇčki tapa basu mqu…ĺi bsu…ĺiŇč mi, su…üjo mi, tki…üi, mniq t…ĺduwan basu bsu…ĺiŇč tutiŇč basu daw dńßuq da. ppwaluk tj…ôn- ¶u patas qtan alaŇč t…ôn- ¶u patas pkla nniqan alaŇč. klwanan s…ôdiq s…ô…ô…üiq t…ĺuku sduwi na ka…ĺi saja ka…ĺi s…ô…ô…üiq t…ĺuku, ka…ĺi t…ôlu. snlńßajan snńßijan bsu…ĺiŇč ki…ĺisto ¶jo…ĺo kjokaj, bsu…ĺiŇč t…ônskjokaj. pnjańßan alaŇč alaŇč bsu…ĺiŇč pa psnakan tutu…ĺu alaŇč, kija ka alaŇč alaŇč min ¶u mi alaŇč bsu…ĺiŇč mi alaŇč minsjaŇč. s…ôdiq tnualaŇč bsu…ĺiŇč ¶bijaw mijańß tńßdil alaŇč ńßini pa, dmuwi kiŇčal kluwan bńßŇčin ptańßu puniq, binaw ini bijaw ńßmu…ĺu ka tasun na, kija mi mbsu…ĺiŇč balaj da, kija splawa dńßa "bsu…ĺiŇč" ka ńßini, dmuwi ńßaŇčal niji ka ńßaŇčan alŇč niji u…ĺi, ńßaŇčan t…ôlu daw wada dńßa b…ĺańßan "sjo…ĺin" da. mwaja baj mijańß tńßdil ńßini ka s…ôdiq tnualaŇč kulu, pusu baj alaŇč pnjańßan dńßa pa kija ka wa mniq daja p…ĺjaxan ńßidaw jani. kŇčkawas **** ¶ida, wada mńßdu mw…ôlu ka …ôlu alaŇč bsu…ĺiŇč, alaŇč sdagan mi alaŇč kulu ka msnul mijańß tńßdil ńßini, alaw ńßba…ĺaw ka s…ôdiq alaŇč kulu, kija ka splawa "alaŇč kulu". alaŇč minsjaŇč pa ńßba…ĺaw baj ka llutu ¶ alaŇč do…ĺas, wa mniq dx…ĺal daja o…ĺjaxan ńßidaw ka pusu nniqan dńßa ¶bijaw, mniq dijax qnlńßaŇčan tanańß tinux ¶bijaw ¶ida pa, pŇčalan ka…ĺi alaŇč ka dmudul stabuj mijańß tńßdil dx…ĺal ńßini. qu…ĺi pplańßan mi sanan …ĺmiwaw == qntan patas ==
